Akwaaba — welcome home

Healing hearts
lifting communities.

The Salih Cares Foundation walks alongside underserved communities across Ghana — delivering direct welfare, mental health support and gentle, lasting hope.

Donate today See our work
100% of gifts go to programs Rooted in Ghanaian communities

"These children remind us why this work is sacred."

— Community elder, Tamale

Our mission

Quiet, consistent care —
delivered with dignity.

Three pillars guide every visit, every meal shared, every circle held. We move slowly, relationally, and always close to the ground.

🧠 Mental health

Safe spaces to heal

Safe spaces to listen, grieve, and grow — facilitated by trained Ghanaian counsellors who understand the culture and the community.

🤲 Welfare outreach

Direct relief with dignity

Food, essentials, and care packages reaching families in the regions that need it most — delivered personally, not through systems.

🌸 Brighter futures

Every child can reach more

Scholarships and mentorship so every Ghanaian girl can imagine — and reach — a future beyond the limits of her circumstance.

Why we exist

The Ghana the world rarely sees.

Hunger, untreated grief, children walking miles for water that isn't safe. These are the quiet emergencies Salih Cares answers — every week, in person, by name.

1 in 4
Ghanaian children in poverty
70%
Lack mental health access
5M+
Without clean water

12k+ Lives touched
Founder

Mrs. Tenny Salih Basintale

A word from our founder
"We don't just give — we stay. We sit, we listen, we love. That is how community heals."

Born of a simple promise, the Salih Cares Foundation has grown into one of Ghana's most trusted grassroots movements for everyday care and mental wellness.

Mrs. Tenny Salih Basintale leads from the front — present at every outreach, every support circle, every moment a family needs someone to show up for them.

12k+Lives touched
48Communities
320Wellness sessions
1,860Care packages

turning point.
